acceptanceCriteria: The GH-15 CHANGELOG entry appears under the Unreleased section, not inside the released 0.8.0 section

The recorded git-diff-check passes; test:all, bench, and plugin validation are rerun and reported in the PR
No external transmission or live Codex invocation occurs during remediation
constraints: No external transmission or live Codex invocation
Preserve v1 artifact semantics through additive versioning
Do not persist absolute paths, transcripts, chain of thought, secrets, or unnecessary command output
Remediation edits stay within the original GH-15 allowed paths
stopConditions: a required check fails twice without a new hypothesis
